summary:
**–Ъ–Њ–љ–≤–µ—А—В–∞—Ж–Є—П**  
`ffmpeg -i in.mp4 -c:v libx264 -crf 23 -c:a aac out.mp4`

**–°–ґ–∞—В–Є–µ**  
`ffmpeg -i in.mp4 -b:v 2M -maxrate 2M -bufsize 4M out.mp4`

**–Ъ–∞–і—А—Л**  
–Ю–і–Є–љ: `ffmpeg -i in.mp4 -ss 00:01:30 -vframes 1 frame.png`

**–Р—Г–і–Є–Њ**  
–Ш–Ј–≤–ї–µ—З—М: `ffmpeg -i in.mp4 -vn -acodec mp3 out.mp3`

**FAQ**  
–°–ґ–∞—В–Є–µ: `ffmpeg -i in.mp4 -vcodec libx265 -crf 28 out.mp4`  
–Р—Г–і–Є–Њ: `ffmpeg -i in.mp4 -q:a 0 -map a out.mp3`  
–Т—Л—А–µ–Ј–∞—В—М –±–µ–Ј –њ–µ—А–µ–Ї–Њ–і–Є—А–Њ–≤–Ї–Є:  
`ffmpeg -ss 00:00:30 -to 00:01:00 -i in.mp4 -c copy out.mp4`  
–Т GIF:  
`ffmpeg -i in.mp4 -vf "fps=10,scale=320:-1:flags=lanczos" out.gif`  
–°–Ї–ї–µ–Є—В—М: —Б–њ–Є—Б–Њ–Ї –≤ `file_list.txt`, –Ј–∞—В–µ–Љ  
`ffmpeg -f concat -safe 0 -i file_list.txt -c copy out.mp4`  
–°–Љ–µ–љ–Є—В—М —А–∞–Ј—А–µ—И–µ–љ–Є–µ:  
`ffmpeg -i in.mp4 -vf scale=1280:720 out.mp4`  
–£–і–∞–ї–Є—В—М –Ј–≤—Г–Ї: `ffmpeg -i in.mp4 -an out.mp4`
